gcc  -fPIC -Wall -Werror  -shared -Wl,-soname,libdsa.so -o libdsa.so CMakeFiles/dsa.dir/home/zhihzen/base/src/dsa/tree.c.o CMakeFiles/dsa.dir/home/zhihzen/base/src/dsa/list.c.o CMakeFiles/dsa.dir/home/zhihzen/base/src/dsa/sort.c.o CMakeFiles/dsa.dir/home/zhihzen/base/src/dsa/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/dsa.dir/home/zhihzen/base/src/dsa/stack.c.o CMakeFiles/dsa.dir/home/zhihzen/base/src/dsa/query.c.o
